manualReview.reviewer: project owner / user-provided (no fabricated 教务 / 部门 name)
manualReview.scope: 浏览器调课弹窗 (推荐按钮 / 候选列表 / 点击填入 / rejected summary / 手动选择 fallback)

lint.warningDriftNote: warning drift 来自 K22 阶段既有 lint debt (preview.ts ResolvedSemester, solver.ts allRoomIds/bestIteration)，与 K23 无关

baseline.trialReadiness: 61/62 (1 expected: K23-A 新增文件导致 working tree 不空)

closedScope: src/components/schedule-adjustment-dialog.tsx (推荐按钮 + 候选列表 + 点击填入, additive ~150 lines)
rules: K22-F2A Linxiao/automotive 5-class specialty classification (verbatim copy)
rules: rejectedSummary (conflict / capacity / linxiaoPolicy / unavailable / other)
rules: minimumSatisfied semantics (< 2 candidates => false + message)
ranking: score = 100 + 历史教室 +20 + 汽车林校 +15 + util [0.30, 0.90] +10 + util>0.90 +5 + 同楼栋 +5 + util<0.30 -10
frontend: candidate list with reasons / warnings
frontend: rejected summary panel when minimumSatisfied=false
frontend: API failure fallback to manual select
frontend: clear recommend on item / targetWeek / day / slot change
manual selection preserved (roomOptions <select> with 不变 option)

knownLimitations.summary: 推荐 ranking 权重固定；尚无真实反馈用于调参
knownLimitations.action: 如需调参，进入 K23-C-ROOM-RECOMMENDATION-QUALITY-TUNING (需真实反馈)

knownLimitations.summary: K22-F2A specialty 分类当前 verbatim copy 在 helper 内部
无 preferred room / homeRoom / room type schema
knownLimitations.action: 如需偏好教室，进入 K23-E-PREFERRED-ROOM-RULES-PLAN

knownLimitations.summary: 仅推荐目标时间下可用教室，不推荐可替代时间
候选仅评估 targetWeek 单周；多周调课按 dry-run 单独判定
knownLimitations.action: 如需多周评估，扩展 helper (K23-C / K23-F 范畴)

knownLimitations.summary: 候选不足 2 个时不返虚假推荐
knownLimitations.action: 已是 by-design 行为 (closeout 时显式保留)

knownLimitations.summary: 181 errors / 134-136 warnings (K22 阶段既有 debt)
knownLimitations.action: K23-A 0 new error；K23 未清理历史 debt

knownLimitations.summary: test:auth-foundation 唯一失败仍为 pre-existing ScheduleAdjustment ACTIVE count mismatch
knownLimitations.action: 未尝试修复 (与 K23 无关)

knownLimitations.summary: real production rollout 前仍建议备份 DB
knownLimitations.action: apply 前必先 cp prisma/dev.db prisma/dev.db.backup-*

postCloseoutDecisionRules.feedbackType: 推荐顺序不理想 (历史教室 / 容量 / 林校权重需调整)
林校 / 汽车规则需要统一维护 (避免 K22 / K23 复制)
需要指定偏好教室 / 专业教室 / room type
候选不足时希望推荐可替代时间
浏览器流程发现 UX bug (按钮位置 / 候选渲染 / toast 抖动)

recommendedDefaultAction: Use in real adjustment workflow; no further K23 mechanical development unless real feedback triggers a follow-up stage. K23 room recommendation officially CLOSED.
